section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

section.name: Enabling autosuggest
section.p: Autosuggest is built into DiscoverySearchComponent; no separate data component is required.

tr.td: Minimum characters before the API is called.
Optional redirect path for full results.

section.name: Suggest-only mode
section.p: Use brxdis_suggest=1 to skip the full search call and return only autosuggest data.

div.source: AutosuggestResult ├── originalQuery ├── querySuggestions ├── attributeSuggestions │ ├── name │ ├── value │ └── attributeType └── productSuggestions ├── id ├── title ├── imageUrl ├── price └── currency

section.name: Bundled FTL template
section.p: The plugin ships brxdis-search.ftl for full search pages and inline autosuggest behaviour. Projects that want a standalone dropdown implementation typically adapt that template's autosuggest markup and JavaScript.

section.name: Catalog view restrictions
section.p: Catalog-view restriction is supported at the service layer through HstDiscoveryService.autosuggest(). It is not exposed as a first-class DiscoverySearchComponent parameter, so projects that need locale- or catalog-specific autosuggest typically subclass the component.
